The magic systems of the Willverse and their parts — Paths and techniques, madra, Territories, Reading, and spellcraft.

; The four systems
* [[:Category:Magic systems|System overview pages]]
* [[:Category:Sacred Arts|Sacred Arts — Cradle]]
* [[:Category:Reader Powers|Reading and the Soulbound — Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Territories|Traveling and the Territories — Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Spells|Spellcraft — The Last Horizon]]

; Parts of the systems
* [[:Category:Techniques|Techniques]]
* [[:Category:Madra|Madra]]
* [[:Category:Goldsigns|Goldsigns]]
* [[:Category:Icons|Icons]]

[[Category:Content]]
